Formerly: EDHI788W.

EDHI679 Master's Seminar (3 Credits) Directed study for master’s degree students writing seminar papers. Formerly: EDPL679.

EDHI680 Gender, Development, and Education (3 Credits)

Focusing on gender as an analytical frame and a discrete variable, a comprehensive view of the relationship between gender and education in the context of national development is presented. It identifies the conditions of men and women's education and policy efforts to promote equity and social transformation.

Credit Only Granted for. EDHI674, EDHI680 or EDHI788K.
